description_long: This is a modern tactical rifle featuring a matte black finish with metallic highlights, designed for urban operations. The rifle is equipped with a suppressor attached to the barrel, reducing muzzle flash and sound. It has a collapsible stock with an ergonomic cheek rest and a pistol grip for improved handling. The rifle includes a detachable box magazine and a vertical foregrip for enhanced stability during firing. A rail system runs along the top, supporting a compact red dot or holographic sight for quick target acquisition. The overall build suggests a robust construction, suitable for high-intensity urban environments.
description: A modern tactical rifle with a suppressor, collapsible stock, vertical foregrip, and a compact sight, finished in matte black with metallic accents.
description_view_0: Side view showing the suppressor, collapsible stock, vertical foregrip, and sight rail clearly.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the suppressor and the alignment of the sight system.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the magazine, stock, and foregrip from the other profile.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock and the back of the sight system.
